description: CompositionGrey kurta made of 100% cotton, with three-quarter sleeves, hakoba stitch detailing on the sleeves and upper chest panel, lace detailing and embroidery on upper chest panel, has a modified boat neck on the front and mid-round neck on the back, and has side split hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this grey kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in its stylish neck, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
